title: PortSwigger: Command Injection
attack_vector:
Web Security Academy
OS command injection
OS command injection
In this section, we explain what OS command injection is, and describe how vulnerabilities can be detected and exploited. We also show you some useful commands and techniques for different operating systems, and describe how to prevent OS command injection.
Labs
If you're familiar with the basic concepts behind OS command injection vulnerabilities and want to practice exploiting them on some realistic, deliberately vulnerable targets
impact: Attacker could exploit command injection vulnerability
